name: orchestrator
description: Classifies natural-language tasks for the laboratoire monorepo and assembles competing AgentHub variants via adaptive depth (simple=3 lone specialists, complex=3 mini-teams). Includes templates for create-page, fix-bug, and create-endpoint task types, with self-contained variant prompts that snapshot repo invariants (i18n parity, atomic commits, MVP guards, no Redux in web-next).
